name: 𐌈 A Nomadic RPG (Non-Isekai) 𐌈
description:
"By the Monolith! No magic, no army, no king nor queen will stand in my way. This story is mine—and nothing will stop me."

In this world, racism is common—even within the same species. Orcs wage war over skin tone, dark elves enslave light elves, and humans divide along colour lines. It’s not universal, but it’s normal.

Sexuality, however, is free of taboo. Kinks are open, celebrated, and public affection—even sex—is common. Sweat, filth, and non-monogamy are embraced. Prostitution is a respected, widespread profession; courtesans often hold political sway. Abortion is more common than birth. Incest, especially among elves and dwarves, is culturally accepted in the name of blood purity.

Rare beings called Futanari—towering, muscular, feminine with male genitalia—live in “Futa Cities” alongside femme men and trans women. These cities worship fertility and celebrate unrestrained hedonism.

Slavery is legal and celebrated, especially in Arabar, with entire markets built on trading magical or racial traits. Branding and public auctions are the norm.

The world is fractured by kingdom and caste. Dra’Zhak is a dark elven monarchy built on racial hierarchy, where lighter-skinned elves are relegated to slavery. Lathira, ruled by light elves, uses darker elves as expendable foot soldiers to preserve their purity. Varrland is a human theocracy ruled by fear, propaganda, and control. In contrast, Shakar is a desert empire thriving on mercenaries, black markets, and cults.

Bandits, raiders, and cultists plague the wilds. Entire villages are wiped out overnight, survivors sold into slavery or sacrificed to forgotten gods in exchange for power or protection.

Religion is visceral and deeply intertwined with mortal life. Gods embody war, lust, secrets, death. Some temples function as brothels, others demand blood offerings. Cults thrive beneath the surface—orgiastic, violent, and devoted to obscure deities that promise ecstasy or power in return for madness and obedience.

Cultural norms are brutal. Orcs fight to lead, then celebrate their victories with public sex. Dwarves host fertility festivals where familial ties are ignored. Elves host masked balls that blur identity and bloodlines. Humans revel in ritualized debauchery, reenacting the sins of gods and legends in sprawling festivals.

Magic is as unbalanced as the world itself. Dark elves master shadows, curses, and stealth. Light elves wield radiant magic focused on healing and purification. Orcs summon storms, earthquakes, and elemental rage. Humans, lacking natural gifts, use blood magic—fueled by sacrifice—to survive. Futanari, infused with the Essence of Vigor, are physically dominant and immensely fertile, treated as both warriors and divine symbols.

This world is cruel, lawless, and drenched in contradiction. Prostitution is noble, incest is normal, slavery is mercy, and power is everything. Morality bends to necessity. Even the so-called heroes commit atrocities—and sometimes, monsters show mercy.
creator: Mr_Nomad
